content_body: Such a gorgeous cabin!! The perfect place to escape the hustle and bustle of our hectic (but fabulous) city lives. We came with several friends, but our main goal was quality time together, and boy howdy did we get that. The gentle patter or rain on the roof- perfect! The rushing river we could see from our bed- perfect! Strolling hand in hand down the hiking path- lovely! The crowning moment though was sunrise, in each others arms. Just a really beautiful and memorable trip. Thank you, thank you, thank you!!
title: Perfect Place To Escape the Hustle and Bustle
